text: [S_0] ("2026-01-01", "Daily report prepared retrospectively due to Departmental needs: Recent Medical History: Sent to ER by 911 due to a reported absence seizure with onset of limb stiffness and head trauma due to falling to the ground.", 0.0, 1.0) | [S_1] ("2026-01-01", "No reported clonus and/or sphincter release.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_2] ("2026-01-01", "The patient reports complete amnesia regarding the event and general partial amnesia (does not remember the month or the medication he is taking).", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_3] ("2026-01-01", "Does not recall fever or other specific previous symptoms.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_4] ("2026-01-01", "Medical history with the RELATIVE: Around 12:30 p.m., while the patient was sitting in the wheelchair and talking to the RELATIVE, he fell backwards, sustaining a head injury, followed by immobility and a fixed, unresponsive gaze.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_5] ("2026-01-01", "Subsequent spontaneous recovery with global amnesia regarding the morning events.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_6] ("2026-01-01", "Home: PHONE_NUMBER RELATIVE: PHONE_NUMBER RELATIVE: PHONE_NUMBER Past Medical History: - Lives with RELATIVE.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_7] ("2026-01-01", "Office worker.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_8] ("2026-01-01", "In a wheelchair from birth.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_9] ("2026-01-01", "- Congenital hypoxic spastic tetraparesis.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_10] ("2026-01-01", "- Arterial hypertension under treatment.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_11] ("2026-01-01", "- Bronchial asthma.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_12] ("2026-01-01", "- Overweight.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_13] ("2026-01-01", "Therapy: Irbesartan, Montelukast, Foster.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_14] ("2026-01-01", "Allergies: dust.", 0.0, 0.5)
